name: Pune
industries: Information technology parks and a major automotive and engineering manufacturing belt drive most project hiring.
intro: Pune's project workforce splits between two economies that both prize certification: the IT corridor of Hinjewadi, Kharadi and Magarpatta, and the automotive-manufacturing belt in Chakan and Pimpri-Chinchwad. Auto and engineering firms run stage-gated product programmes where PMP-style discipline is native; the software parks live in sprints, so CSM and agile credentials open doors there. The result is a market where certified professionals can move across industries without leaving town. Our two-day weekend batch runs live online on Indian Standard Time — practical for a city where techies commute long distances between suburbs. Trainers use cases from both worlds: supplier-driven engineering programmes and distributed agile delivery for global clients. Afterwards you get exam application guidance, mock exams that mirror the real paper, and continued doubt-clearing support until you pass.

faq.q: What are the class timings in Pune?
faq.a: Live classes run 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM IST, which is 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM IST in Pune. You can pick a weekend (Sat–Sun) or a weekday (Wed–Thu) cohort; each completes the course over two consecutive days.

faq.q: Is the training online or at a venue in Pune?
faq.a: All batches are 100% live online, taught by an instructor over video with interactive exercises — there is no venue to travel to in Pune. You need a laptop, a stable connection and a free weekend.

faq.q: Is the certificate different if I attend from India?
faq.a: No. The certification is issued by the same global body regardless of where you attend from, and holds identical recognition with employers in India and internationally.

faq.q: Can my employer in Pune sponsor the course?
faq.a: Yes. We issue invoices suitable for corporate sponsorship and reimbursement, and most employers in India accept them under learning and development budgets. Group pricing is available for teams.
